tools.description: Generate passport-size photo sheets instantly from any image. Supports multiple formats and layouts.
tools.longDescription: A powerful online tool that converts regular photos into perfectly sized passport photos. Upload any image, auto-crop to standard passport dimensions, and generate printable sheets with multiple copies. Supports various international passport photo standards.
tools.name: Instant Passport Photo
